data.description: OpenAI subpoenaed for documents covering broad scope of its activities, user impact: WSJ

data.title: OpenText to Create 400 Jobs with €105 Million Investment in Cork and Galway to Expand Agentic AI and Sovereign Cloud in Europe
data.description: Irish Prime Minister Micheál Martin and CEO of IDA Ireland Michael Lohan have partnered with OpenText to unveil the establishment of a new Cork Centre of Excellence for EMEA. This investment signifies the largest by a Canadian technology company in Ireland. It will focus on enhancing research and development in areas such as intelligent AI, secure cloud services, and cyber resilience, reinforcing OpenText's commitment to innovation.

data.title: Atlas Welding Supply Established as Reliable Gas and Welding Supplier in Birmingham Ahead of Steel & Auto Industries' $6B+ Alabama Investments
data.description: The steel and auto manufacturing industries in Alabama have attracted billions of dollars in new investments. These sectors heavily rely on gas and welding supplies for their operations. In Birmingham, Atlas Welding Supply is the go-to local provider for industrial and trade professionals, offering a wide range of gases and safety gear essential for these industries.

data.title: Inman Unveils Reimagined Event Experience Ahead of Inman Connect San Diego 2026
data.description: A prominent real estate news and media organization is upgrading the attendee experience at its Connect events. They are introducing new programming formats and a networking community platform. Additionally, attendees will have enhanced personal branding opportunities, AI-powered tools, and the chance to enjoy an on-site podcast.

data.title: Cherry On Top: The Beachwaver Co. Makes the Creator PR Package Shoppable With Kelsey Martinez Collaboration
data.description: A new beauty tool partnership featuring the limited edition "Cherry on Top" bundle from Kelsey Martinez has been announced, marking her first collaboration in this space. The bundle is currently available for purchase on Beachwaver.com and TikTok Shop. The announcement was made on June 12, 2026 in New York. The initiative by The Beachwaver Co.® aims to commemorate creator-driven beauty, community, and confidence through this launch.

data.title: InformData Awarded on TIME's list of the America's Top WorkTech Companies 2026
data.description: InformData has been named one of America's Top WorkTech Companies for the year 2026 by TIME magazine, further solidifying the company's commitment to transitioning from conventional data delivery to establishing a trusted network of individual data that businesses can depend on for making informed choices. The accolade was received in KENNESAW, Ga. on June 12, 2026, highlighting the company's recognition in the industry.

data.title: SoarPay's New Payment Processing Book Reaches Amazon Bestseller Status and #1 New Release in E-Commerce
data.description: Written by Adam Carlson and Andy Hagans, a new book provides a comprehensive manual on merchant accounts and payment processing for businesses operating in e-commerce and regulated sectors. Released on June 12, 2026, in Houston, the book, "High Risk Merchant Accounts 101: The Essential Guide to Payment," offers valuable insights for those navigating the complexities of financial transactions.

data.title: CommuteHub Connects with Spin to Bring Shared Micromobility into Commuter Programs
data.description: RideAmigos has joined forces with CommuteHub to introduce e-scooters and e-bikes, enhancing first- and last-mile transportation options on June 12, 2026, in Santa Monica, California. This partnership offers commuters in public transportation demand management programs and employees at major companies a wider range of choices for their daily commute.

data.title: Beyond Cannabinoids: Azuca Expands TiME INFUSION® for Functional Terpene Beverage Innovation
data.description: Azuca is utilizing its established molecular encapsulation and infusion platform for terpene applications, assisting brands in developing innovative sensory and functional experiences. As of June 12, 2026, the New York-based company Azuca, known for TiME INFUSION®, is undergoing this initiative.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP Continues to Investigate Claims of Securities Fraud against Via Transportation, Inc
data.description: A company by the name of Ademi LLP is currently in the process of investigating potential securities fraud claims against Via Transportation, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol VIA. The investigation has been prompted by concerns that Via Transportation may have provided misleading information related to its financial status and business operations. This investigation was initiated on June 12, 2026, in Milwaukee.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP Investigates Claims of Securities Fraud against GPGI, Inc.
data.description: On June 12, 2026, Ademi LLP announced an investigation into potential securities fraud claims against GPGI (NYSE: GPGI). The probe focuses on potential misleading statements made by GPGI relating to its financial reports, business activities, and future outlook. Investors are urged to join the investigation for more information.

data.title: TRUQAP® (capivasertib) combination approved in the US as first and only targeted treatment for PTEN-deficient metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, the US FDA has approved AstraZeneca's TRUQAP® (capivasertib) along with abiraterone and prednisone as the initial targeted therapy for adult patients with PTEN-deficient metastatic androgen pathway modulation-naïve or sensitive (mAPMN/S) prostate cancer. This marks the first approved treatment for this condition, formerly known as metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer (mHSPC), as identified by an FDA-authorized test.该 US FDA的批准从 百分率 容来自 毫。

data.title: Lorien AI Launches Integration with MeridianLink Mortgage to Power the Future of In-Workﬂow AI for Lenders
data.description: Lorien AI has introduced conversational AI, document automation, and underwriting support to enhance modern lending teams within MeridianLink Mortgage. The innovative move was disclosed in Miami on June 12, 2026. Lorien AI, known for offering agentic AI solutions to mortgage lenders, revealed that its platform will now be seamlessly integrated with MeridianLink Mortgage, equipping them with the latest technologies.

data.title: Dr. Jasvant Modi Supports UCLA's Milestone Inaugural Lecture for Bhagavan Abhinandan Endowed Chair in Jain Studies
data.description: In a recent event in Los Angeles on June 12, 2026, Dr. Jasvant Modi, a member of the Jain community, has teamed up with other community donors to provide backing for UCLA's Bhagavan Abhinandan Endowed Chair. This support will facilitate the university's scholarly exploration of Jain traditions and worldwide religious philosophies. This generous initiative marks a significant milestone in widening the academic pursuits of UCLA and highlights the increasing collaboration between academic institutions and philanthropic individuals.

data.title: TTR Sotheby's International Realty Recognized in 2026 RealTrends Verified + The Thousand Rankings
data.description: TTR Sotheby's International Realty agents and teams have achieved remarkable success in Washington, D.C., Maryland, and Virginia. The company recently stood out in the 2026 RealTrends rankings, showcasing their exceptional performance. This recognition further solidifies their position as industry leaders in the region.

data.title: ASKP3 publishes first interdisciplinary consensus standards for IV ketamine treatment in the United States
data.description: With a growing number of ketamine misuse cases, a recent report by the American Society of Ketamine Physicians, Psychotherapists, and Practitioners reveals a new consensus as a comprehensive practical guide. Released on June 12, 2026, the framework aims to address the rising issue.

data.title: Savvy + Co. Real Estate Presents Bartlett Manor: A Rare Opportunity to Create a Custom Luxury Estate in Mint Hill
data.description: On June 12, Bartlett Manor in Mint Hill, North Carolina, was announced to provide a unique chance to develop a bespoke luxury estate on five secluded acres. The property offers the opportunity for a personalized design, with a focus on timeless architecture and the potential for an outstanding equestrian lifestyle. Conveniently located just a few minutes away from Charlotte, this exceptional property presents an exclusive opportunity for those looking to create their dream estate in a picturesque setting.

data.title: Global Electronic Services Answers Demand for Reliable HMI Repair Services With Enhanced Global Advantage Program
data.description: Global Electronic Services has recently upgraded its Global Advantage program to set a new benchmark in dependable HMI repair services. The program now includes a 2-year in-service warranty, a repair price guarantee, and round-the-clock maintenance support, ensuring added value and peace of mind for customers. The company, based in Buford, Ga., made this announcement on June 12, 2026.

data.title: Visa Application Rejections Still Affect Thousands of Travelers Each Year & VisaSyst Explains Why
data.description: With the shift towards strict digital border controls worldwide, a significant number of travelers are encountering visa denials for minor mistakes. VisaSyst has launched a new "pre-check" service that integrates automated validation and professional assessment to mitigate these issues. This proactive approach aims to prevent the rejection of thousands of visas annually due to administrative errors.

data.title: GL Homes Opens Stellar Model Home at Valencia Sky in Naples
data.description: Florida's leading private homebuilder, GL Homes, has opened tours for the Stellar model home at Valencia Sky, their top 55+ active adult community in Naples. The Stellar model, currently available for viewing, showcases the pinnacle of luxury living in this sought-after community. Residents and potential buyers can now explore the exquisite features and amenities offered by GL Homes at Valencia Sky. This initiative marks GL Homes' commitment to providing top-quality housing solutions for the 55+ demographic in Naples. Visit the community today to experience the unmatched lifestyle on offer.
